data.title: Alcoa Beats Q3 EPS Expectations, Rides Alumina Price Surge Despite Production Hiccups
data.description: Alcoa reports Q3 results, missing sales consensus, alumina production down and aluminum production up sequentially. Adjusted EBITDA and EPS exceed consensus, declares dividend, maintains 2024 outlook, plans strategic cooperation agreement for San Ciprián facilities.

data.title: Tesla Showcases Optimus' Autonomous Navigation, Charging Abilities After Admitting They Were Human Assisted 'To Some Extent' At Robotaxi Unveiling Event
data.description: Tesla on Thursday shared a new video of its Optimus humanoid robot operating around a company factory, demonstrating progress made including its ability to avoid people while navigating.

data.title: Former FDIC Chief Warns Federal Reserve To 'Not Stir The Pot' With Further Rate Cuts: 'Some Have Called It A Goldilocks Economy, But…'
data.description: Bair stresses that stimulating demand through rate cuts might lead to increased inflation.

data.title: Crypto Advocate Reacts To Elizabeth Warren's 'Return On Investment' Allegations Against John Deaton, Outlines ROI He Expects From GOP Candidate
data.description: Jameson Lopp, a noted Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) technologist and advocate, shared his expectations from pro-cryptocurrency nominee John Deaton who is running for senate against Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.).

data.title: Warren Buffett's Stock Sales Point To Overvalued Market, Says Hedge Fund Manager David Einhorn: 'Not A Great Time To Have A Lot Of Equity Exposure'
data.description: The stock market is currently at its most expensive in decades, according to David Einhorn, a billionaire investor. This assessment is based on the recent stock sales by another prominent investor, Warren Buffett.
